mustPass: Home route and contact route are always present.
Routes and section ids use kebab-case slugs.
Structure supports both standard company presentation and manufacturing-specific product enquiry.
Product-oriented content is central because this industry needs to show what is actually made.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the business like a generic local service only focused on area coverage.
Do not imply ecommerce, live inventory or checkout unless the site actually has it.
Do not use vague service labels where concrete product categories are more useful.
Do not invent certifications, production volumes or customer counts.
